title: pyrus pulchra
intro: Pyrus pulchra, also known as the Chinese flowering pear, is a deciduous tree native to China, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The bark, leaves, and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus pulchra include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Pyrus pulchra include teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
